items.headline_en: NVIDIA Open-Sources Isaac GR00T N1.7: Open Reasoning VLA Model for Humanoid Robots
items.summary_en: Isaac GR00T N1.7 is an open-source vision-language-action (VLA) model released by NVIDIA on Hugging Face, bringing open reasoning capabilities to humanoid robotics.

items.headline_en: AWS Security Agent and DevOps Agent Exit Preview, Now Generally Available
items.summary_en: AWS Security Agent (on-demand penetration testing) and DevOps Agent are now generally available. These frontier agents work autonomously to handle security testing and cloud operations at scale, running persistently for hours or days without human oversight.
items.evidence_excerpt: Artificial Intelligence AWS launches frontier agents for security testing and cloud operations by Swami Sivasubramanian on 31 MAR 2026 in Announcements , Artificial Intelligence , Security & Governance , Thought Leadership Permalink Comments Share I’m excited to announce that AWS Security Agent on-demand penetration testing and AWS DevOps Agent are now generally available, representing a new class of AI capabilities we announced at re:Invent called frontier agents. These autonomous systems work independently to achieve goals, scale massively to tackle concurrent tasks, and run persistently for hours or days without constant human oversight. Together, these agents are changing the way we secure and operate software. In preview, customers and partners report that AWS Security Agent compre...

items.headline_en: Qwen Introduces Qwen3Guard: First Safety Guardrail Model Built on Qwen3
items.summary_en: Qwen3Guard is a real-time safety guardrail model built on Qwen3, designed for precise safety classification of prompts and responses with risk levels and categorized results. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on major safety benchmarks across English, Chinese, and multilingual environments.
items.evidence_excerpt: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin, Qwen3Guard ensures responsible AI interactions by delivering precise safety detection for both prompts and responses, complete with risk levels and categorized classifications for accurate moderation. Qwen3Guard achieves state-of-the-art performance on major safety benchmarks, demonstrating strong capabilities in both prompt and response classification tasks across English, Chinese, and multilingual environments.... September 23, 2025 · 7 min · 1470 words · Qwen Team Qwen-Image-Edi...

items.headline_en: Replicate Launches Agent Skills: Expert Instructions for AI Coding Assistants
items.summary_en: Replicate published Agent Skills — markdown instruction files that give coding assistants (Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, OpenCode) expert knowledge on model discovery, API execution, and prompting for image and video generation. Skills follow the open Agent Skills spec and complement Replicate's MCP server.
items.evidence_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Sk...
items.target_summary: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover mo...
items.target_excerpt: Changelog RSS Atom li]:pb-8"> Agent skills for Replicate April 21, 2026 Replicate now publishes agent skills , a collection of markdown instruction files that give coding assistants expert knowledge about working with AI models on Replicate. Skills cover model discovery, comparison, and execution via the API, along with detailed prompting techniques for image generation and video generation models. They follow the open Agent Skills spec and work with Claude Code, OpenCode, OpenAI Codex, and other compatible tools. Install Copy npx skills add replicate/skills This installs all of Replicate’s skills into your project and configures them for your coding assistant automatically. Skills and MCP Skills are complementary to Replicate’s MCP server . MCP gives your coding assistant API tools. Skills give it knowledge about how to use those tools well: which models to choose, how to write prompts, and what tradeoffs to consider. For more details, see the agent skills reference or the GitHub repository . Fallback model for Nano Banana Pro March 2, 2026 Nano Banana Pro can now fall back to a backup model (currently ByteDance Seedream 5.0 lite ) when Google’s API is at capacity, instead of f...

items.headline_en: Cohere Retires Five Models: Embed v2.0 and Aya Expanse/Vision 8B
items.summary_en: Cohere retired five model IDs on April 4, 2026: embed-english-v2.0, embed-english-light-v2.0, embed-multilingual-v2.0, c4ai-aya-expanse-8b, and c4ai-aya-vision-8b. Recommended replacements are embed-v4.0 for embedding tasks and command-a-reasoning-08-2025 for chat tasks.

Requests using these model IDs will fail. Retired models: embed-english-v2.0 embed-english-light-v2.0 embed-multilingual-v2.0 c4ai-aya-expanse-8b c4ai-aya-vision-8b We recommend these replacements: Embedding tasks embed-english-v3.0 embed-multilingual-v3.0 embed-v4.0 Chat tasks command-r7b-12-2024 command-a-03-2025 command-a-reasoning-08-2025 For the full announcement and lifecycle context, see the Deprecations page. For questions or assistance, contact support@cohere.com .

items.headline_en: Cohere Restructures Enterprise AI into Three Tiers: North, Compass, Model Vault
items.summary_en: Cohere's pricing page now presents three enterprise tiers: North (all-in-one platform with generative models, search, and AI agents), Compass (intelligent search with managed index and pre-built connectors), and Model Vault (dedicated secure model hosting, billed hourly or per instance).

items.headline_en: Mistral March Releases: Voxtral TTS, Mistral Small 4, Leanstral, Moderation 2603
items.summary_en: Mistral's March releases include: Voxtral TTS (text-to-speech with zero-shot voice cloning and real-time streaming), Mistral Small 4 (hybrid instruct/reasoning/coding model with 256k context), Leanstral (open-source Lean 4 formal proof agent), and Mistral Moderation 2603.
items.evidence_excerpt: Developers Resources Changelog Changelog Find out about all the latest changes to our tool. You may filter by date and type of release. Mar 26 March 23 We released Voxtral TTS ( voxtral-tts-2603 ), our state-of-the-art text-to-speech model with zero-shot voice cloning, multilingual support, and real-time streaming. MODEL RELEASED March 16 We released Mistral Small 4 ( mistral-small-2603 ), a hybrid model unifying instruct, reasoning, and coding in a single multimodal model with a 256k context window. MODEL RELEASED We released Leanstral ( labs-leanstral-2603 ), our first open-source code agent designed for Lean 4 formal proof engineering. MODEL RELEASED March 12 We released Mistral Moderation 2603 ( mistral-moderation-2603 ). MODEL RELEASED We added Custom Guardrails support for Agents...

items.summary_en: The xAI API reference page has been updated, now highlighting Grok 4.20 Multi-Agent API as its primary feature, alongside the platform's reasoning and enterprise model lineup.

items.headline_en: OpenAI Launches Codex Transformation Partners for Enterprise AI Adoption
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduced Codex Transformation Partners, a new enterprise program pairing organizations with system integrators to deploy Codex at scale. A companion post outlines broader Codex use cases across industries.
